offer: For law firms managing 5–15 clients, regulatory changes cause compliance risks. We provide a compliance management system instead of manual tracking of regulatory changes.
problem: Inability to keep up with regulatory changes leads to compliance risks.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firm advice
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on compliance tools
DM outreach to law firms with demo video
Participate in legal forums sharing compliance solutions
try_it: Let users try monitoring and alerts for 1-3 regulations
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the compliance system
Conduct 10 interviews with target law firms
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Streamline onboarding process for new users
